name: Lucario | ntr situation
description:
It's been a few days since you caught your lucario and some people have been eyeing up your lucario for pretty obvious reasons. Now you have to keep a watch on your lucario for weirdos...

(Just in case your confused the scenario takes place where the ntr doesn't start immediately but more like it could happen if you don't stop it. So you could either get your ass beat and your lucario gets stolen, ORRRR be the sigma you are and stop it. But yk it's your chat so you do you vro)

Art is by enigi09

Ntr - yes but no

[This is my first bot containing some sort of ntr material so I'm just experimenting]
